title: Fix OpenCart Migration: Information Pages, TipTap, Images, Tags
description: Fix critical issues in OpenCart migration: migrate information pages to blog, convert HTML to TipTap JSON, fix missing product images, create tags from categories
requirements: Migrate oc_information (information/information pages) to BlogPost - these are news/instructions pages, NOT products
Convert HTML content from OpenCart to TipTap JSON format for product.description and blog.content
Fix product images: ensure images download correctly and paths are saved properly
Create tags from blog categories (Новости, Инструкции) and link to blog posts
Add redirect rules for information/information URLs to blog posts
Ensure product descriptions include all HTML content converted to TipTap format
acceptance_criteria: OCInformation pages migrate to BlogPost with correct tags
Product descriptions are valid TipTap JSON (not plain HTML)
Blog posts have valid TipTap JSON content
Product images download and display correctly (no 404)
Blog posts linked to appropriate tags
implementation_notes: Add migrate_information() method to handle oc_information → BlogPost
Use meta_keyword from oc_information_description to create tags
Install html-to-tiptap or similar library for HTML → TipTap JSON conversion
Update _download_image() to return both URL and verify file exists
Create Tag model if not exists, link via blog_post_tags association table
Update seed_redirects.py to include information/information URLs
For products: parse oc_product_description.description HTML → TipTap JSON
Ensure image paths use settings.MEDIA_ROOT correctly
